incidence.source: Primary care and ENT outpatient data

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; hearing loss and discomfort

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Otoscopy showing occluding cerumen with symptoms (hearing loss, fullness)

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care otoscopy; ENT referral for difficult removal
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Cerumenolytics, irrigation, manual removal; counsel against cotton swabs
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited ENT access in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Low-cost treatment available in primary care
